title: Rising Optimism: Analysts Say "Buy" Despite Earnings Uncertainty
text: According to FactSet's Earnings Insights report from June 9, although analysts are forecasting S&P earnings to decline in the current quarter, they project EPS growth to return in the second half of the year.

title: Raymond James Analyst on MLPs and the Outlook for Natural Gas
text: With solid first-quarter earnings in the rearview and lots of upside opportunity, it's an exciting time for MLPs and the midstream space. VettaFi recently sat down with Raymond James analyst J.R.
